title: Termination of the accreditation of the Securities Dealer Representative Licence of Mr. Eyal Alon (SDR008)
text: The Financial Services Authority (“FSA/Authority”) hereby gives notice to the general public, pursuant Section 4(1)(m) of the Financial Services Authority Act, 2013 (“FSA Act”), the accreditation of Mr. Eyal Alon as the Representative of Phoenix Limited has been terminated, effective as of February 13th, 2026.
